frame_eqs_str: a['wave_r']=(a['wave_r']+(0.400*((0.60*Math.sin((0.933*a['time'])))+(0.40*Math.sin((1.045*a['time'])))))); a['wave_g']=(a['wave_g']+(0.400*((0.60*Math.sin((0.900*a['time'])))+(0.40*Math.sin((0.956*a['time'])))))); a['wave_b']=(a['wave_b']+(0.100*((0.60*Math.sin((0.510*a['time'])))+(0.40*Math.sin((0.550*a['time'])))))); a['zoom']=(1+(0.01*((0.60*Math.sin((0.339*a['time'])))+(0.40*Math.sin((0.276*a['time'])))))); a['rot']=(a['rot']+(0.010*((0.60*Math.sin((0.381*a['time'])))+(0.40*Math.sin((0.579*a['time'])))))); a['left']=(0.5+(0.25*(Math.sin((0.555*a['time']))+Math.sin((1.111*a['time']))))); a['right']=(0.5+(0.25*(Math.sin((0.333*a['time']))+Math.sin((1.222*a['time']))))); a['centrex']=div((a['left']+a['right']),2); a['distx']=(0.1+div((Math.abs((a['centrex']-a['left']))+Math.abs((a['centrex']-a['right']))),2)); a['q1']=(a['centrex']+a['distx']); a['q2']=(a['centrex']-a['distx']); a['wave_x']=a['centrex']; a['top']=(0.5+(0.25*(Math.sin((0.888*a['time']))+Math.sin((0.999*a['time']))))); a['bottom']=(0.5+(0.25*(Math.sin((0.444*a['time']))+Math.sin((1.333*a['time']))))); a['centrey']=div((a['top']+a['bottom']),2); a['disty']=(0.1+div((Math.abs((a['centrey']-a['top']))+Math.abs((a['centrey']-a['bottom']))),2)); a['q3']=(a['centrey']+a['disty']); a['q4']=(a['centrey']-a['disty']); a['wave_y']=(1-a['centrey']);
